project_type: pnpm monorepo with Next.js 15 (App Router) frontends + Fastify backends
build_system: turbo (pnpm workspaces). turbo.json defines typecheck, build, test tasks. `pnpm typecheck` runs 109 tasks, `pnpm build` runs 84 tasks.
verification_instructions: Run `pnpm typecheck` (must hit 113/113 after adding 4 new apps) and `pnpm build` (must hit 88/88 after adding 4 new Next.js builds).
setup_instructions: pnpm install (already installed). Baseline: 109/109 typecheck, 84/84 build passing.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network. pnpm store is available. Node 22+.
contribution_requirements: No @ts-ignore. No mock data arrays in components. Use React Query hooks. Use @quant/shared-ui components. Mobile-first responsive. Accessible (semantic HTML, ARIA).
key_patterns: Each frontend app follows: package.json with next/react/react-dom/@tanstack/react-query deps, devDeps for types/tailwind/postcss. tsconfig.json for Next.js (target ES2017, module esnext, moduleResolution bundler, jsx preserve, plugins next, paths for @quant/* and @/*). tsconfig.backend.json for backend-only typecheck. next.config.mjs with transpilePackages and standalone output. tailwind.config.ts scanning ./app/**/*.{ts,tsx} and ../../packages/shared-ui/src/**/*.{ts,tsx}. postcss.config.mjs with tailwindcss+autoprefixer. src/app/ with layout.tsx (Inter font, QueryProvider wrapper), page.tsx, error.tsx, loading.tsx, globals.css. src/providers/query-provider.tsx. src/hooks/ with useQuery hooks. src/services/api-client.ts. Scripts: dev (next dev), build (next build), start (next start), typecheck (tsc --noEmit && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.backend.json).
directory_structure: apps/ contains all apps, packages/ contains shared packages. Each app has backend/ (Fastify routes/services) and src/ (Next.js frontend). turbo.json at root.
